title: nephrolepis cordifolia var. occidentalis
intro: Nephrolepis cordifolia var. occidentalis, commonly known as the western sword fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lomariopsidaceae, native to the western Pacific regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The western sword fern has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through methods such as drying, infusing in water, or making into teas, capsules, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
